CONT. ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-28-2001 Continued To Mar-21-02 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

Motion To Extend Jurisdiction Of Arbitration.
MINI MINUTES: Defendants Carlyn Clause and Alan Eichstaedt, DBA Hauswerk Architectural Desing's Motion to extend jurisdiction of Arbitrator is scheduled today. There being no appearance or an objection tentative ruling to grant motion is adopted. The Arbitrator's jurisdiction is extended to 2/28/02. The Arbitration Order to Show Cause is re-set to 3/21/01 at 1:30 PM, in department 212. Proposed order submited signed. Proceedings reported by: Diana Chen. (212)
